title: Journey To A New World
description: Nearly 300 years ago, a small band of valiant vegetables would embark on a ship they called The Cauliflower to settle an unknown land, led by the fearless Obadiah Bumbly.
quote: Oh, Brother Obadiah, thou art so… uptight.
altHero: sailing ship moving across the ocean
alt1: Obadiah Bumbly, a pilgrim cucumber, planting a flag on the beach
alt2: Apply’s Fun House where you can play checkers
alt4: Ephraim Apply, an apple, talking with Obadiah Bumbly
